history.text: Venezuela declared independence or statehood, marking a decisive political break.
Venezuela became independent from Gran Colombia, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Venezuela.

worthSeeing.title: Angel Falls:
worthSeeing.text: The world's highest uninterrupted waterfall (979 m) in Canaima National Park.

worthSeeing.title: Gran Sabana:
worthSeeing.text: Vast plateau landscape of tepuis (tabletop mountains) and ancient geology.

worthSeeing.title: Canaima National Park:
worthSeeing.text: UNESCO site covering 3 million hectares of jungle, rivers, and tepuis.
